docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CARDENAS, MANUEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARDENAS, MANUEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, PETRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDENAS, MANUEL $780.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $795.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $780.00 FILED BY GARCIA, PETRA AS TO DEFENDANT CARDENAS, MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $90.13 AS TO DEFENDANT CARDENAS, MANUEL
